ddls:
CREATE TABLE "genomics_samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the sample belongs to */,
  "sample_name" TEXT /* Name of the sample */,
  "tax_id" INTEGER /* Taxonomy ID for the sample */,
  "scientific_name" TEXT /* Scientific name for the sample */,
  "sample_type" TEXT /* Type of the sample */,
  "center_name" TEXT /* Center name for the sample */,
  "submission" TEXT /* Submission ID for the sample */,
  "dbgap_study_accession" TEXT /* dbGaP study accession for the sample */,
  "consent" TEXT /* Consent type for the sample */,
  "sample_collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the sample was collected */,
  "sample_treatment" TEXT /* Treatment or condition applied to the sample */,
  "sample_storage" TEXT /* Storage conditions for the sample */,
  "sample_delivery_date" TEXT /* Date when the sample was delivered to the sequencing facility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genomics_pipelines" (
  "pipeline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pipeline */,
  "pipeline_name" TEXT /* Name of the pipeline */,
  "pipeline_description" TEXT /* Description of the pipeline */,
  "pipeline_software" TEXT /* List of software tools used in the pipeline */,
  "pipeline_parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used for each software tool in the pipeline */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pipeline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genomics_analysis_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the result belongs to */,
  "pipeline_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pipeline used for analysis */,
  "result_file_path" TEXT /* Path to the analysis result file */,
  "result_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the analysis results */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genomics_analysis_results_pipeline_id FOREIGN KEY ("pipeline_id") REFERENCES genomics_pipelines ("pipeline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genomics_users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, administrator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genomics_user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the permission belongs to */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the permission is for */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Level of permission granted to the user for the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genomics_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES genomics_users ("user_id")
)
